description: Resolve Jewish holiday windows and publish normalized temporal context for downstream intents.
routing_examples: What are the start and end times for Passover 2027 in my location
Before creating the routine, resolve Shavuot 2026 timing
Find Yom Kippur start and end boundaries for 2026
router_hints: Use this intent when the user asks to resolve Jewish holiday dates/windows (Pesach/Passover, Shavuot, Yom Kippur, Rosh Hashana, Sukkot, etc.).
Prefer this intent as a prerequisite step in route_plan before routine_automation when holiday timing is required for schedule construction.
Queries such as 'when is pessach/pesach/passover' must route to this intent even when year is omitted; year fallback is handled by the intent.
